title: astracantha dissecta
intro: Astracantha dissecta, also known as the spiny broom or Astragalus dissectus, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and Middle East. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Astracantha dissecta is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
